    Screen Recording Made Simple

    Record your screen, share instantly, and collaborate with your team.

    theRec is a browser-based screen recorder built for modern teams.

    No download required • Works in your browser • Free plan available

    theRec is the official website for recording your screen, uploading videos, and collaborating with your workspace team. To use core features, we request account/profile information and recording metadata only to authenticate users, organize workspaces, process videos, and enable secure sharing. Read our full policy here: Privacy Policy.

    Trust & Security

    Built with transparency,privacy, and secure collaboration

    theRec is designed for modern teams that need secure video communication, protected workspace collaboration, and reliable recording infrastructure.

    Secure Authentication

    Protected login, workspace access control, and secure account authentication across your organization.

    Private Video Access

    Control who can access recordings using workspace permissions or secure shareable links.

    Automated Video Processing

    Videos are automatically optimized for playback, streaming, thumbnails, and organization.

    Minimal Data Collection

    We only collect essential account and recording data necessary to operate the platform.

    Privacy PolicyTerms & Conditions
    Site Overview

    Everything you and your team needto communicate with video

    theRec helps teams record, explain, share, and collaborate asynchronously — without meetings, complicated tools, or downloads.

    Instant Browser Recording

    Start recording immediately with no installation required. Capture your screen, tab, or window directly from your browser.

    Upload Existing Videos

    Already have recordings? Upload and organize them inside your workspace in seconds.

    Async Team Collaboration

    Share visual updates instead of scheduling meetings. Keep communication faster and clearer.

    Privacy & Access Control

    Keep recordings private, workspace-only, or publicly shareable with secure links.

    Fast Video Playback

    Videos are processed automatically for smooth streaming and instant viewing.

    Workspace Organization

    Manage recordings, teammates, permissions, and collaboration from one central place.

    Async Communication

    Replace long meetingswith quick video updates

    Share product demos, bug reports, tutorials, onboarding videos, and team updates without interrupting everyone's schedule.

    Product demos
    Bug reporting
    Team updates
    Client walkthroughs
    Async onboarding
    Resources

    Insights formodern async teams

    Practical guides on screen recording, async video, and secure collaboration—written for teams who want clarity without another meeting.

    Guides12 min read

    7 Proven Ways to Improve Remote Team Communication Without Adding More Meetings

    Remote teams do not fail because people are lazy. They fail when messages pile up in the wrong channels, context disappears between time zones, and every update turns into a calendar invite. Here is what actually works.

    Read article
    Guides11 min read

    How to Collaborate Across Time Zones Without Burning Out Your Team

    Global teams have a hidden advantage: work can move while half the team sleeps. The trap is turning that advantage into late-night calls and constant urgency. Here is how to build a sustainable rhythm.

    Read article
    Guides10 min read

    6 Practical Ways to Reduce Meeting Fatigue on Remote Teams

    Back-to-back Zoom calls are not collaboration—they are exhaustion with a webcam on. Remote teams that protect focus time ship better work and keep people longer. These six tactics actually stick.

    Read article
    Flexible pricing for

    Flexible pricing forindividuals and teams

    Questions?We've got answers

    What is theRec used for?

    theRec helps individuals and teams record their screen, explain ideas visually, share video updates, and collaborate asynchronously without unnecessary meetings.

    Do I need to install any software?

    No. theRec works directly in your browser, so you can start recording instantly without downloading or installing anything.

    Can I share recordings with people outside my workspace?

    Yes. You can generate secure public links for external sharing or keep videos private inside your workspace.

    Is theRec suitable for remote teams?

    Absolutely. theRec is built for async communication, making it ideal for remote teams, distributed companies, product demos, onboarding, and team updates.

    How are videos processed after recording?

    Videos are automatically processed in the background to generate optimized playback formats, thumbnails, and streaming-ready files.

    Can I upload existing videos?

    Yes. In addition to screen recording, you can upload existing video files and organize them inside your workspace.

    Are recordings private and secure?

    Yes. You control who can access recordings through workspace permissions and secure sharing settings.

    Is there a free plan available?

    Yes. You can start with a free plan and upgrade anytime when your team needs more storage, collaboration, and advanced features.

    Start Free

    Start recordingin less than a minute

    Create your workspace, record your screen, and collaborate with your team — directly from the browser.
